news.summary: The S&P 500 experienced a significant increase, indicating a general sense of relief in the markets as President Trump decided to avoid implementing steep tariffs.
news.headline: Markets rally as Trump delays global tariffs, S&P 500 surges in relief.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent on tariff talks: Everything is on the table.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: The pause is not because of the market reaction.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent on tariffs: It was the President's decision.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: The tariff change was made because of countries contacting, it was a processing problem.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: There's a 90-day pause because Trump wants to be involved, the pause gives time to negotiate.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: I expect partners to come with their best deal.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Trump created maximum negotiating leverage.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent reiterates we have been overwhelmed by allies response.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We're seeing Vietnam today, then Japan, India and South Korea.

news.summary: Cosmos Health is currently in the process of enhancing its Cana facility and has recently finalized a deal with Pharmex to manufacture a significant quantity of 300,000 bottles of the antiseptic medication AMBITASOL 1 liter.
news.headline: Cosmos Health expands Cana facility and signs 5-year agreement with Pharmex for 1.5M bottles of antiseptic drug AMBITASOL 1L.
SalMar ASA paid a cash dividend, key info provided.

news.summary: President Donald Trump has implemented a 90-day suspension on "reciprocal tariffs" and reduced the tariff rate to 10% for countries that do not retaliate with counter-tariffs. However, concerning China, the reciprocal tariff rate has been raised to 125% due to their counter-tariffs against the US. In a post on Truth Social on April 9, Trump expressed hope that China would realize the need to cease exploiting the US and other nations. Consequently, the S&P 500 index surged by nearly 7%, while the Nasdaq saw an increase of around 8% after the announcement. The capital markets displayed significant volatility amidst macroeconomic uncertainty and the potential for an extended trade dispute. Adam Back mentioned that Bitcoin has 'fully decoupled' from the tariff turmoil. The situation is ongoing, and additional updates will follow.
news.headline: Trump halts reciprocal tariffs for 90 days, decreases rate to 10%. China faces 125% tariffs for counter-tariffs. Markets rally - S&P 500 up 7%, Nasdaq up 8% on the news. Development continues.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We will work on a solution with our trading partners.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: I am not calling it a trade war, but China has escalated.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, SalMar ASA's board of directors officially examined and sanctioned the year-end financial reports for 2024.
news.headline: SalMar's 2024 financial statements approved on April 9, 2025 by the board of directors.

news.summary: Following President Trump's announcement of authorizing a halt on most trade tariffs, both cryptocurrency and stock prices have surged dramatically. The market has seen a significant increase in value, with crypto prices experiencing a sharp rise and stock prices following suit. The halt on trade tariffs has resulted in a positive impact on the market, with both sectors showing remarkable growth. The news has led to a surge in investor confidence, with cryptocurrency prices increasing by a notable percentage and stock prices also seeing a significant uptick. This announcement has had a substantial effect on the market, with cryptocurrency values skyrocketing and stock prices reflecting a similar trend. Investors are responding positively to this development, as seen in the impressive surge in prices across both sectors.
news.headline: Bitcoin and stocks soar as Trump puts 90-day hold on tariffs, except on China. Prices surge in response.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Mexico and Canada included in 10% tariff.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Raising tariffs on China due to escalation.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent calls China the biggest source of US trade problems.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Raising duties on China to 125%, countries who did not retaliate will be rewarded.
WH Press Sec. Leavitt: We will continue with tailor-made negotiations.
WH Press Sec. Leavitt: Higher tariff because China imprudently decided to retaliate.
WH Press Sec. Leavitt: The tariff level will be brought down to a universal 10% while negotiations are ongoing.

news.summary: Following President Trump's announcement of a temporary halt on the majority of trade tariffs, both cryptocurrency and stock prices have experienced a significant surge. The decision has led to a notable increase in market activity, with cryptocurrency values rising by 15% on average and stock prices seeing a spike of over 10%. Traders and investors have responded enthusiastically to the news, propelling the overall market momentum towards positive growth.
news.headline: Bitcoin, XRP, and stocks surge as President Trump confirms 90-day pause on tariffs, except on China. Prices soaring in response.
Goldman Sachs: 65% chance of US recession in next 12 months. (Forecast made prior to Trump tariff pause)
Weekly buyback program: details of shares repurchased and total amount spent will be released. Stay tuned for updates.

news.summary: Several major altcoins such as XRP, Solana, and Cardano have seen significant declines over the past week amidst a broader crypto market selloff attributed to concerns over Trump's aggressive tariffs impacting global risk sentiment. XRP is currently priced at $1.84 with a market cap of $107.2 billion, experiencing a 15.6% decrease in the last seven days. Solana is trading at $107.00 with a market cap of $55.14 billion, showing an 18.6% drop over the same period. Cardano's price is $0.5746, with a market cap of $20.3 billion, reflecting a 17.4% decrease. According to Crypto trader Alex RTB, Solana is not expected to recover until it nears the $80 mark, identified as the safest accumulation zone, even though some anticipate a further decline to $20-$25. For long-term investors, $80 is seen as the optimal entry point. Crypto chart analyst Ali Martinez offered additional insights on the market trend.
news.headline: XRP, Solana, Cardano down 15% in 7 days due to market selloff. XRP $1.84, $107.2B cap -15.6%. Solana $107, $55.14B cap -18.6%. Cardano $0.5746, $20.3B cap -17.4%. Trader believes Solana will rally at $80.
WTO on US and China trade tensions: Preliminary projections suggest that merchandise trade between the two economies could decrease by as much as 80%.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: The world is ready to work with Trump, but China heads the opposite way.
WTO on US-China trade tensions: A division of the global economy into two Blocs could lead to a long-term reduction in global real GDP by nearly 7%.

news.summary: Delray Beach, Florida - On April 9, 2025, Fresh Blends®, a top provider of iced and frozen beverage solutions, announced its launch of a certified organic menu tailored for specialty grocers, hospitals, K-12 schools, and colleges & universities. The company, known for its turnkey solutions, is targeting these specific sectors with the aim to offer a variety of chef-crafted options.
news.headline: Fresh Blends® debuts new certified organic menu for Specialty Grocers, Hospitals, K-12, and Colleges & Universities on April 9, 2025 in Delray Beach, offering chef-crafted turnkey beverages.
Traders see little chance of Fed rate cut in May in sharp repricing after Trump pauses big tariffs on countries except China.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, it was announced that Mark J. Golden, FASAE, CAE, will be resigning as the chief executive officer of the Association for Diagnostics & Laboratory Medicine (ADLM, formerly AACC) when his contract expires on August 17. Golden expressed pride in the achievements made in advancing the organization during his tenure.
news.headline: Mark J. Golden to resign as CEO of ADLM, formerly AACC, on August 17, 2025. No. of years served and achievements mentioned.

news.summary: A recent report from Pittsburgh on April 9, 2025 revealed an issue where between 25% to 50% of bird feed is being dislodged from a feeder whenever the wind causes the feeder to hit the pole. The feed that ends up on the ground remains untouched by finches, who are known to be selective eaters. This situation highlights a potential wastage of bird feed and indicates a need for a solution to prevent the feed from falling off the feeder.
news.headline: Inventor creates device to stabilize finch feeders, preventing 25%-50% of feed loss in windy conditions.

news.summary: Kalshi, a prediction marketplace, has begun accepting Bitcoin deposits to attract more crypto-native users. The company allows users to bet on various events and has gained popularity among crypto traders. Event contracts for predicting Bitcoin's hourly price changes have generated $143 million in trading volume. Kalshi, regulated by the CFTC, offers 50 crypto-related event contracts, including bets on coins' future highs and lows, and even on US President Trump's proposed National Bitcoin Reserve. The platform also accepts USD Coin deposits and relies on ZeroHash for converting BTC and USDC deposits into USD. Kalshi accurately predicted Trump's election win and currently shows a 68% chance of a US recession. It faced a lawsuit from the CFTC but has since partnered with Robinhood to expand its reach. Kalshi competes with Polymarket and has seen significant success in the prediction market industry.
news.headline: Kalshi starts accepting BTC deposits, eyes more crypto users. $143M traded on Bitcoin hourly price changes alone. Now lists 50+ crypto event contracts. Accepts BTC only on Bitcoin network. Traders predict a 68% chance of US recession. Source: Kalshi.

news.summary: The technology industry is currently racing to reconfigure supply chains in response to the new tariffs imposed by the Trump administration. These tariffs threaten to hinder the President's objectives in advancing artificial intelligence (AI) technologies. The potential consequences have prompted tech companies to take swift actions to mitigate disruptions in their supply chains. This move comes amid concerns that the tariffs could hamper the growth and development of AI, a critical sector for the future economy. Experts warn that the impact of these tariffs may ultimately undermine the very goals they intend to support. It remains to be seen how the tech industry will navigate this challenging landscape to uphold its position as a global leader in AI innovation.
news.headline: US tech industry rapidly reorganizing supply chains amid tariffs amid fears it could hinder Trump's AI plans

news.summary: A company based in Georgia sought advice from other companies in the industry and ultimately decided to team up with a partner in Texas to guarantee consistent operations and client assistance. On April 9, 2025, Higginbotham, recognized as the leading independent firm offering insurance, financial, and HR services, as reported by Business Insurance, was chosen for this strategic partnership.
news.headline: Fort Worth's Higginbotham partners with Tidwell & Hilburn Insurance of Macon, Georgia for continuity and client support.
Trump: authorized a 90-day pause on non-retaliating countries.

news.summary: The article discusses the current state of the cryptocurrency market amidst trade war tensions between the US and China. Bitcoin is holding above the crucial support level of $73,777, with the possibility of a potential rally if the People's Bank of China weakens the yuan. Investors are cautious, as seen by $595.9 million in outflows from US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs. The analysis delves into the price movements and key levels to watch for Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, BNB, Solana, Dogecoin, Cardano, UNUS SED LEO, Chainlink, and Toncoin. Price analyses suggest bearish momentum for some coins, with key resistance levels and potential support zones noted. The article closes with a disclaimer that it does not offer investment advice, highlighting the risks involved in trading and advising readers to conduct their own research before making investment decisions.
news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices are volatile due to trade tensions. BTC avoids sharp fall, trading above key support at $73,777. Struggles suggest bearish momentum but buyers may emerge at $67,000. ETH at $1,368 support could see relief rally to $1,786. XRP faces resistance at $2, bears eye $1.61 support. BNB forms higher low at $520, but faces resistance at downtrend line. SOL struggles below $110 support, facing resistance at $120. DOGE battle at $0.14, sees support at $0.10. ADA defends $0.50, potential drop to $0.45. LEO recovery, but may face selling at $9.36. LINK support at channel pattern, faces resistance at moving averages. TON support at $2.84, possible plunge to $2.35. Market outlook remains uncertain. Investors showing caution with $595.9M outflows from US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs. Will BTC hold $73,777 support or fall? Altcoins analyzed.

news.summary: The implementation of the Trump tariffs has raised concerns for manufacturers of tech products, as they now fear a decrease in demand which could hamper sales. This situation, also known as "demand destruction," poses a challenge for the electronics industry.
news.headline: Trump tariffs may hinder tech sales with "demand destruction" as makers of electronics face uncertainties.

news.summary: Meta's stock experienced a reduction in price target from BofA as the company lowered estimates for several digital advertising firms. This latest cut adds to the pressure on Meta's stock. The decrease in price target comes amidst concerns about tariffs impacting the advertising market. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Meta stock faces pressure with another price target cut by BofA amid tariff impact on ad market.
Trump: 90-day pause applies to reciprocal and 10% tariffs.
US Defense Secretary Hegseth in Panama, says Panama Canal is key terrain that must be secured by Panama with the US, and not China.
Trump: Raising China tariff to 125%.

news.summary: Wilson Sonsini Goodrich & Rosati, a leading legal services provider for technology, life sciences, and growth companies globally, has introduced Marc Berger to its newly established General Counsel in Residence (GCIR) initiative. Berger, who brings more than 25 years of expertise, specializes in leveraging data as a critical asset. His extensive background involves navigating organizations through legal and regulatory challenges related to health data and AI strategies, as well as developing go-to-market strategies.
news.headline: Marc Berger joins Wilson Sonsini's GCIR program with 25 years of experience focusing on data strategies and legal complexities.

news.summary: The Dow Jones and other major stock indexes experienced gains despite escalating trade tensions between the U.S. and China. Noteworthy increases were seen in the stocks of Nvidia and Tesla. The market showed resilience amidst the backdrop of trade war news, with the Dow Jones rising. This positive trend was observed despite warnings from President Trump.
news.headline: Stock market rises despite U.S.-China trade war tensions. Dow Jones up. Nvidia and Tesla saw gains.

news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC, April 9, 2025 - In a recent news commentary released by USA News Group on behalf of Lake Victoria Gold Ltd., it was highlighted that amidst ongoing tariff discussions from the White House, gold prices have surged past $3,010. This hike in prices signifies a renewed preference for gold in the markets, showcasing its resilience and appeal to investors.
news.headline: Gold prices surge past $3,010, signaling market preference for gold as tariff talks continue from the White House.
Canadian Spokeswoman: Canadian Finance Minister said Canada is committed to continue discussions, including as G7 president, on the impact and reactions to US tariffs.
31 counterparties take $168.115 bln at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
